title: Crash And Burn - The Amy Schumer Story
description:
She was once hailed as the Queen of Comedy, the boundary-pushing comedian with a string of hit shows and successful movies to her name. Now? Now she's practically toxic, hated by her former fans and discarded by Hollywood. This is the Amy Schumer story.
